panels.description: Webhook ingress throughput. No traffic in the selected window should stay at 0, not No data.
panels.title: Webhook 接收速率 (QPS by Source)

panels.description: Application-side active webhook_events count gauge. The _ratio suffix is an OTel export naming artifact.
panels.title: 活跃表告警数 (Active DB Records)
API 请求速率 (HTTP Rate by Route/Status)
队列、Worker 与 Pipeline (Queue / Worker / Pipeline)

panels.description: Consumer pending and lag are the real backlog signals. Redis Stream retained entries (XLEN) may keep growing until maxlen trimming and should not be read as unconsumed work.
panels.title: 队列消费积压 (Pending / Lag / Retained)
Worker 任务速率 (Worker Task Runs)
Worker 任务耗时 P95 (Worker Task Duration)
Webhook 端到端处理耗时 P95
Pipeline 步骤速率 (Pipeline Step Rate)

panels.description: Higher values mean a scheduled task has not succeeded recently. No data means the task has not emitted this gauge yet.
panels.title: Scheduler 距离上次成功时间
告警降噪趋势 (Noise Reduction by Relation)
大模型调用累计成本 (Total AI Cost)

panels.description: If no AI analysis ran during the rate interval, histogram quantile may be empty or NaN.
panels.title: AI 响应延迟 (AI P95/P50)
可观测后端、RUM、Beyla 与压测 (Telemetry Backends / RUM / eBPF / k6)
Faro 前端 RUM 接收量
Beyla 自动采集耗时 P95
进程 CPU 使用率 (Beyla Process CPU)

panels.description: k6 writes stale markers after a run, so range functions are used intentionally.
panels.title: k6 Smoke 压测结果

panels.description: Shows which environment and services the selected datasource is actually receiving. Useful when a public Grafana points at dev-like telemetry.
panels.title: 当前采集环境与服务 (Environment / Services)

panels.description: Current active HTTP requests by route. Payload sizes are tracked separately in Webhook Payload 大小 P95.
panels.title: HTTP 活跃请求 (Active Requests)
Webhook 与 Pipeline 深度诊断 (Webhook / Pipeline Deep Dive)
队列操作耗时 P95 (Queue Operation Duration)
Webhook 处理状态变更速率
AI、降噪与转发补充 (AI / Noise / Forwarding Deep Dive)
AI Token 消耗 (Tokens by Model)

targets.expr: sum by (webhook_source, webhook_relation, webhook_suppressed) (rate(webhook_noise_evaluations_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)

panels.title: AI 成本按模型 (Cost by Model)
采集链路与服务拓扑补充 (Telemetry / Service Graph Deep Dive)

targets.expr: sum by (client, server, connection_type) (rate(traces_service_graph_request_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)

panels.title: 服务拓扑调用速率 (Service Graph)

targets.expr: sum by (client, server, connection_type) (rate(traces_service_graph_request_failed_total[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)

panels.description: P95 duration of Loki write requests from Alloy to Loki.
panels.title: Loki 写入延迟 P95

panels.description: Write retries and dropped entries/bytes. Any sustained non-zero value deserves collector/Loki inspection.
panels.title: Loki 重试与丢弃 (Retries / Drops)
